summary: Verified logo-visibility fix on CrimsonMC store homepage. Hero logo, brand logo, tab title, favicon, and /api/config logo_url all confirmed working.

test_results.console_errors: Two 401s observed (unrelated to logo - likely auth/session probe endpoints)

critical_code_review_comments: Two unrelated 401 errors observed in console on homepage load - not blocking, but main agent may want to investigate which endpoint returns 401 to a logged-out visitor
